title: JavaScript Runtime, Tooling, and Evidence · Behavior Brief: Strict Mode
summary: Trace a small service-status script from source through parsing, execution, console evidence, and a user-visible result. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js strict mode increment in a reproducible service-status runtime notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain strict-mode behavior and use modules without depending on error-prone sloppy-mode semantics.
Use console evidence, breakpoints, scope inspection, watch expressions, and stack traces without relying on logging alone.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
